title: Fix the bug(s) in mergeIntervals (intervals.mjs)
prompt: intervals.mjs exports `mergeIntervals(intervals)`, which should merge overlapping OR touching [start, end] intervals (e.g. [1,3] and [3,5] merge to [1,5]) and return them sorted by start. It returns wrong results for some inputs. Find and fix the bug(s) in intervals.mjs — keep the function signature and do not mutate the input array.
